issues.title: Fabric realTimeCanadianSeasons is defined but not loaded or saved
symptoms: The Fabric realTimeCanadianSeasons setting may not persist across restarts or config reloads.
workarounds: UNKNOWN: no reliable permanent user workaround is confirmed from the current source tree.
Re-check the setting after restart when testing current source builds.

issues.title: tickSnowPiller appears unused in the current source tree
symptoms: Changing tickSnowPiller may have no visible effect.
workarounds: Use tickSnowReplacer and maxSnowAccumulationLayers for current snow tuning.
Treat tickSnowPiller as non-functional until confirmed otherwise.

notes: No official issue tracker export was found in this repository.
Issues listed here come from direct source review.
